heading: Review of large-scale programs
label: 17252 Review of large-scale programs
text: The Secretary shall enter into an arrangement with the National Academy of Sciences for an independent review and oversight, beginning in 2011, of the programs under and under , to ensure that the benefits of such programs are maximized. Not later than , the Secretary shall transmit to the Congress a report on the results of such review and oversight.section 16293(c) of this titlesection 17251 of this titleJanuary 1, 2012
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the date that is 1 day after , see , set out as a note under , The Congress.Dec. 19, 2007section 1601 of Pub. L. 110–140section 1824 of Title 2
